title: Solid jokes
description: Solid jokes this is a set of cool things and tools
body:
# About:
This mod adds utilities and items that improve the quality of life. The mod is based on autism mechanics and story progression.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d4571083ba3837c6ed546ae70286bcd2196d59c.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6356aab2749c78e9318c05f06782af368e57bbba.png)

# Content:

## Mobs
List of mobs added by the mod, italicized bosses:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Autist
- _Сore of the prison of souls_
- crazy pig
- _Engineer_
- Creation of war
- _Founder's Pet_

</details>

## Blocks
The mod adds three new crafting stations, a new wood breed and a new ore!

## Structures
Solid jokes adds two new structures: the Founder's Church and an ancient fountain

## Items
The mod adds new weapons, among them a sword with three phases of improvement, a scythe, its improved version and more!

## Content in development that will appear in the future:
- Alchemistry
- New structures
- New biomes
- New mobs and bosses
- New music disks

# Some additional information:
## 🔠Translations
I plan to translate the mod into as many languages as possible, unfortunately I only know three: English, Russian and Latin. If you know any other language, please help with the translation: you can offer with translation on [GitHub](https://github.com/Parnich/Solid-jokes)
## 🪲Bug hunt
I constantly monitor bugs and play with the mod myself often to find translation inaccuracies/technical bugs, if you find a bug, submit it on the [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/Parnich/Solid-jokes/issues)
## 📖Guide
I recommend installing Jei or a similar mod to view crafting, but you can read the lore and crafting recipes on the [wiki](https://github.com/Parnich/Solid-jokes/wiki)(still a WIP)

# Plot & Lore:
you can learn the lore of this mod while playing the game by reading descriptions of items, achievements and such when exploring the world, but if you want to know the story right now, I'll summarize it briefly.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Once, the creator of this world, the mysterious Founder was defeated, then the god of time Arkady imprisoned the player in his mind, and the change for and night is Arkady's thought processes, one day the player will be able to get the mysterious box and find the key to the exit....

</details>
